title: INFERNO ADVENTURES
description: This modpack includes new world generation, new rpg classes, new structures, new weapons, new mobs and animals, new foods and ways to cook them, battle ships, dragons, new accessories and much more!
body:
This modpack brings together a diverse range of features to enhance your Minecraft experience, combining exploration, combat, RPG elements, decoration, and performance improvements. With a strong base of APIs and libraries, such as Fabric API, Cloth Config, and World Weaver, it ensures compatibility and smooth integration for all included mods.

**Combat and RPG**
Arm yourself with enhanced gear and abilities! Utilize powerful tools like Advanced Netherite, Mythic Metals, and Dragon Loot for superior combat capabilities. With RPG mods, choose from classes like Paladins, Rogues, Wizards, and even the Berserker. Equip yourself with unique RPG jewelry and Runes to boost your stats and unlock new powers.

<details>
<summary>COMBAT AND RPG MODS</summary>

[Runes](https://modrinth.com/mod/runes): base mod for rpg classes.
[Gazebo](https://modrinth.com/mod/gazebos): adds a new structure for enchanting spellbooks.

[Wizard class](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards): adds wands and spells.
[Archer class](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers): adds powerful bows and spells for them.
[Rogue and warrior classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors): adds powerful weapons and spells for them.
[Paladin and priest classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests): adds powerful protections and spells for them.
[Witcher class](https://modrinth.com/mod/witcher-rpg-class): adds powerful weapons and spells for them like in "The Witcher" games.
[Berserker class](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class): adds powerful weapons and spells for them.
[Elemental wizard class](https://modrinth.com/mod/elemental-wizards-rpg): adds wands and spells. 

[Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry): adds jewelry that grants different combat related bonus.
[Additional Jewelry RPG](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-rpg-jewelry): adds even more jewelry that grants different combat related bonus.
[Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts): adds cosmetic items that cannot be crafted found in chests.

</details>




**Food and Farming**
Enjoy a realistic farming experience with Farmer’s Delight and expansions such as AppleSkin and Fish of Thieves. Discover unique dishes and crops inspired by various biomes, including BetterEnd Delight and Pumpkin Pie Delight, adding depth to the culinary aspects of Minecraft.

<details>
<summary>FOOD AND FARMING MODS</summary>

[Farmer's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated): base cooking mod.
[More delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-delight): adds more food.
[Ocean's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight): adds ocean related food.
[Seed delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/seed-delight): adds seed related food.
[Ube's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/ubes-delight): adds filipino inspired food.
[Dumplings delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/dumplings-delight-rewrapped): adds dumplings.
[Pineapple delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/pineapple-delight): adds pineapples and recipes with it.
[Pumpkin pie delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/pumpkin-pie-delight): adds a new uses to pumkin pies.
[Betterend delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend-delight): adds end related food.
[Betternether delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether-delight): adds nether related food.
[Storage delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/storage-delight): adds new storage for food.
[Crate delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/crate-delight): adds food crates for better storage.
[Autochef's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/autochefs-delight): automates food processing.

[Farmers cutting betternether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-betternether): adds bark to the new trees in the nether.
[Farmers cutting biomes o plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-biomes-o-plenty): adds bark to the new trees in the world.
[Farmers cutting oh the biomes weve go](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-oh-the-biomes-weve-gone): adds bark to the new trees in the world.

[Fish of thieves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves/version/1.0.8-rc1-fabric): adds new fish and trophies.

[Lets do vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery): adds wine.
[Lets do farm](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-farm-charm): adds facilities for your farm.
[Cornexpansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-addon-corn-expansion): adds corn and recipes with it.

</details>



**Decoration and Building**
Customize every inch of your world with Macaw’s extensive line of decoration mods, including paintings, furniture, and holiday-themed items. Add personal touches with chisel variations, 3D skin layers, and even falling leaves for a picturesque environment. Structure-focused mods like Dungeons and Taverns and Additional Structures expand exploration potential, giving every corner of your world a new story.

<details>
<summary>DECORATION AND BUILDING MODS</summary>

Chisel: adds new variants of blocks.
Comforts: adds hammocks and sleeping bags.
Handcrafted: adds vanilla-like decor.
More chiseled bookshelf: adds chiseled bookshelves variants.
Shutter: adds window shutters.
Amendments: adds small changes to existing minecraft blocks.
Beautify: adds vanilla-like decor.

Macaws paintings: adds more paintings.
Macaws holidays: adds christmas decor.
Macaws lights and lamps: adds more light blocks.
Macaws fences and walls: adds more fence designs.
Macaws furniture: adds more furniture.
Macaws windows: adds new types of windows.
Macaws roofs: adds new types of roof.
Macaws doors: adds new types of doors.
Macaws bridges: adds new bridges.
Macaws trapdoors: adds new types of trapdoors.
Macaws paths and pavings: adds new paving designs.

</details>



**World Generation and Exploration**
Explore biomes like never before with Biomes O' Plenty, Better End, and Oh The Biomes You’ll Go. Discover detailed, unique landscapes powered by mods like Tectonic and Terralith. Structures and dungeons are enhanced with Better Archaeology and Deeper and Darker, making exploration both challenging and rewarding.

<details>
<summary>WORLD GENERATION MODS</summary>

Additional Structures: adds more structures to the world.
Better Archeology: adds new archeological structures.
Dungeons and Taverns: 
Tidal towns: adds ocean villages.

Better End: adds new biomes to the end dimension.
Better Nether: adds new biomes to the nether dimension.
Biomes o plenty: adds new biomes.
Oh the biomes weve go: adds new biomes.
Tectonic: adds new biomes.
Terralith: adds new biomes.

Deeper and Darker: adds a new dimension to the deep dark.

</details>




**Performance Optimization**
Built to handle expansive gameplay with minimal lag, performance-enhancing mods like Sodium, Ferrite Core, and Dynamic FPS ensure smooth, high-quality visuals. Entity Culling and Noisium reduce strain on your device, even with large worlds and numerous active entities.

<details>
<summary>PERFORMANCE MODS</summary>

Chunky
Dynamic FPS
Entity Culling
Ferrite core
Glitch core
Immediately Fast
Indium
Lithium
ModernFix
Noisium
Sodium
Sodium extra

</details>




**Mechanics and Quality of Life**
Experience streamlined gameplay with quality-of-life mods like Simple Voice Chat, Traveler’s Backpack, Universal Shops, and Xaero’s Minimap for navigation. Mechanical mods like Reinforced Chests and Trinkets add utility, while Size Shifting Potions bring a magical twist to your adventures.

<details>
<summary>MECHANICS AND QO MODS</summary>

**FACILITIES:**
Xaeros Minimap
Xaeros Worldmap
BlueMap
Paginated advancements
Accessories fabric
Accessories tclayer
Better F3
Chat Heads
elytra slot
Essential mod
Jade
JEI
Leave my bars alone
Mouse tweaks
Remove terralith intro message
Trinkets

**ITEMS:**
Elytratrims
Toffys hooks
Genshin instruments
elytra trims
Icarus
Things
Travelers backpack

**TRANSPORT:**
Small Ships

**BLOCKS:**
Haunt furnace
Quartz elevator
Waystones
Reinforced barrels
Reinforced chests
Reinforced shulkers

**STRUCTURES:**
Trading post
Universal Shops

**AESTHETIC:**
Nicer Skies
Nicer portals
Talk Bubbles
Ambient Sounds
Lambdynamiclights
Not Enough Animations
3d skin layers
Continuity: connects textures.
Falling leaves: adds visual leaves falling of trees.
Pressence Footsteps: adds sopunds to your footsteps.

**MECHANICS:**
Size shifting potions
Sit!
Player ladder
SuperSimpleHome
Tpa
You're in grave danger
Simple Voice Chat

</details>




**Mobs and Animals**
Expand your interactions with animals through mods like Horse Expert and Eraver’s More Animal Products, which introduce more realistic breeding, care, and behavior. Face tougher foes with Bosses of Mass Destruction for ultimate combat challenges.

<details>
<summary>MOBS AND ANIMALS MODS</summary>
  
**BETTER HORSES:**
Call your horse
Horse expert
Kaffees dual ride
Horse shoes
Simple netherite horse armor

**MORE ANIMAL INTERACTION:**
Eravern's more animal products
Milk all the mobs
Better Pets

**DRAGONS:**
Useless reptile

**BOSSES:**
Bosses of mass destruction

</details>
